name: Ubiquiti PoE+ Adapter
title: Ubiquiti PoE+ Adapter
short_description: PoE adapter for UniFi PoE+ devices, 48V DC 0.65A, 802.3at, RJ45 data input
description: PoE adapter for UniFi PoE+ devices, 48V DC 0.65A, 802.3at, RJ45 data input

detailed_description.heading: Ubiquiti PoE+ Adapter
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti U-POE+ Adapter is designed to enhance network installations by providing both power and data through a single Ethernet cable to devices that support the IEEE 802.3at PoE+ standard. This powerful adapter is capable of delivering up to 30 watts of power, accommodating the needs of more demanding network devices such as advanced access points, surveillance cameras, and VoIP systems. The U-POE+ from Ubiquiti simplifies the deployment of network hardware by eliminating the need for separate power cables, thereby reducing both cost and installation complexity. Its capacity to deliver up to 30 watts makes it an essential tool for supporting high-power devices in a network setup.

detailed_description.heading: Features
detailed_description.text:
Delivers up to 30W of PoE+
Compatible with U6 LR, U6 Enterprise, Camera DSLR, and other PoE+ devices
Surge, peak pulse, and overcurrent protection
Contains RJ45 data input, AC cable with earth ground, and PoE+ output
LED indicator for status monitoring

detailed_description.heading: Durability and Design
detailed_description.text: Constructed from industrial-grade materials, the U-POE+ is both durable and reliable. Its compact design facilitates easy integration into various environments without occupying excessive space, making it a versatile choice for many network configurations. Moreover, with support for data rates up to 1 Gbps, the U-POE+ ensures that network speeds are maintained, which is critical for applications requiring high bandwidth such as video streaming or large file transfers.

detailed_description.heading: Protection and Monitoring
detailed_description.text: The adapter also includes integrated surge protection and intelligent power management to safeguard against electrical spikes and surges. These features help prevent damage to both the power supply and connected devices, enhancing overall network reliability. Equipped with LED indicators, the U-POE+ provides visual cues about power, connectivity, and activity. These indicators are essential for system monitoring and troubleshooting, helping users to quickly identify and resolve any issues.

detailed_description.heading: Installation and Performance
detailed_description.text: The U-POE+ is designed for easy and quick installation. It is a plug-and-play device that requires no software configuration, making it accessible for users of all technical levels and significantly reducing setup time. Its comprehensive features and strong performance make it an indispensable component of any network demanding power efficiency and high data throughput.
